name: Rax Runner!
short_description: an endless runner featuring the infamous 43 of Akron
detailed_description:
Play as the infamous 43 as he tries to acquire all the Collection Points that he can before the cops show! But beware! for the king of GobboVille has set up road blocks such as walls with his propaganda posters and beds that may or may not have been shot full of holes to stop you along the way! He has even sent out his enforcer, the mysterious Black Dragon, to patrol the streets, trying to catch our fetid hero! avoid him and get the greatest distance you can away while collecting as many points as possible!

Wear a variety of disguises to try and hide yourself from the corrupt cops as you run! Be anything from a Pro Gamer, a samurai trained in Bul-Shid-O, a Vai-King Warrior, and an army brat. You can even dress in your Vitch Baby form because theres no way theyd ever expect you in your true form!
